summary: Frontend-only verification of panel i18n P0 regression fix + 3 P1 polish bugs. Tested /panel unauthenticated login page across en/fr/hi/zh + dark-mode Radix portal. ALL 210 locale keys resolve correctly — ZERO raw i18n key leaks detected in any of the 4 languages. useTheme.js correctly mirrors theme to documentElement (html.dark + data-theme=dark), so shadcn/Radix dropdown inherits dark styling (portal bg=rgb(10,10,10), fg=rgb(250,250,250)). Help toggle is closed by default in all 4 langs (no .help-box in DOM until button click). Redundant .panel-input-hint spans removed — only placeholders remain as helper text. Mobile viewport 375x812 clean, no overflow. <strong> tags preserved in all 4 locale files for fm.getStarted.step1Body.
verifications_passed: EN: title='Sign in to your hosting panel', submit='Sign In', remember='Remember username on this device', forgotPin='Forgot your PIN?', theme tooltip='Switch to dark mode', pin tooltip='Show PIN' — no leaks.

FR: title="Connectez-vous à votre panneau d'hébergement", submit='Se connecter', remember="Se souvenir du nom d'utilisateur sur cet appareil", forgotPin='Vous avez oublié votre PIN ?', theme tooltip='Passer au mode sombre', pin tooltip='Afficher le PIN' — no leaks.

HI: title='अपने होस्टिंग पैनल में साइन इन करें', submit='साइन इन करें', remember='इस डिवाइस पर उपयोगकर्ता नाम याद रखें', forgotPin='क्या आपने अपना PIN भुला दिया?', theme='डार्क मोड में स्विच करें', pin='PIN दिखाएं' — no leaks.
ZH: title='登录到您的主机面板', submit='登录', remember='记住用户名在此设备上', forgotPin='忘记您的 PIN？', theme='切换到深色模式', pin='显示 PIN' — no leaks.

Help toggle closed by default in all 4 langs: helpBoxExists=false on initial load in en/fr/hi/zh. Click in hi reveals help box with translated forgotPinHint ('बॉट खोलें, मेरे होस्टिंग योजनाओं पर जाएं...').
Help toggle close-state text uses common.close: toggled button label becomes 'बंद करें' (hi) — common.close key wired correctly.

Redundant placeholder+hint removed: hintSpans query returns [] ; no .panel-input-hint element in DOM. Placeholders 'Enter your cPanel username' / 'अपना cPanel उपयोगकर्ता नाम डालें' / 'Entrez votre nom d'utilisateur cPanel' / '输入您的 cPanel 用户名' serve as the only helper text.
Dark-mode theme mirroring (useTheme.js fix): document.documentElement.className='dark', dataset.theme='dark'. Body bg=rgb(10,10,10).

LanguageSwitcher Radix portal in dark mode: [data-radix-popper-content-wrapper] contents have bg=rgb(10,10,10) color=rgb(250,250,250) via bg-popover/text-popover-foreground — NO white-on-dark issue. Screenshot confirms visually dark dropdown.

Mobile 375x812 (hi): panel-login-card width 327px, no horizontal overflow (cardRight <= bodyWidth). All text wraps cleanly. Language auto-detect banner also translated ('हमने देखा कि आपका ब्राउज़र हिन्दी में है').
Locale file parity: en/fr/hi/zh all 210 keys — identical structure, no missing keys.
<strong> tags preserved in fm.getStarted.step1Body across fr/hi/zh (inspected raw locale files). Placeholder {{count}} preserved in login.attemptsRemaining_{one,other} across all 4 langs.
i18n key leak regex scan (panel|login|fm|common|dashboard)\.[a-zA-Z0-9_.]+ against body text → empty array in en/fr/hi/zh.
verifications_skipped_deferred: FileManager, DragOverlay, ImagePreviewModal runtime i18n — requires logged-in session; WHM origin firewalled and no cPanel creds available. Locale keys (fm.*) all exist in all 4 files and are wired per source grep (verified via spot-checks of FileManager.js, DragOverlay.jsx, ImagePreviewModal.jsx t() calls). Recommend runtime verification next iteration when cPanel test account available.
PanelDashboard visitWebsite + theme toggle tooltip — same reason (requires auth). Keys dashboard.visitWebsite / panel.theme.* present and wired in source.
critical_code_review_comments: Language auto-detect banner (shown on first Hindi visit) appears above the login card on mobile and briefly obscures the H logo. Minor UX — consider dismissible-once-per-session state or placing it below the hero. Not blocking.

login.pinPlaceholder renders in a letter-spaced style ('अ प ना  P I N  डा लें' visible on screenshot due to font-feature spacing). Looks intentional for PIN cadence but worth confirming with design. Not a bug.
Locale file key count is 210 per language — consider adding a CI jest-based schema check (deepKeys(en) ⊆ deepKeys(fr/hi/zh)) to catch future regressions automatically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All panel i18n fixes VERIFIED green on unauthenticated /panel. Next logical pass (when cPanel creds / live WHM available): log in as a test user and exercise (a) FileManager 'Get your website online' guide rendering across fr/hi/zh — especially that .zip file, ftp address etc. render as bold HTML not literal text — remember PanelLogin/FM already use dangerouslySetInnerHTML or i18next Trans? If literal shows up, wire or dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{__html: t(...)}}. (b) FileManager table headers / row action tooltips / drag overlay / image-preview modal under fr/hi/zh. (c) PanelDashboard visitWebsite title + theme toggle title. (d) Attempts-remaining plural forms (trigger lockout flow to validate attemptsRemaining_one vs attemptsRemaining_other).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs reproduced this iteration. All claimed P0 (i18n) + P1 (theme mirror, duplicate hint, help default-closed) fixes validated.
